session_title.description: Concise description of what the user is working on (max 8 words, ~80 chars)

session_title_key_phrases.description: Key terms/files related to the session title (3-7 phrases)

latest_intent.description: Specific last request or goal (max 12 words, ~120 chars)

latest_intent_confidence.description: Confidence in the latest intent (0-1). >0.8=explicit, <0.6=needs context

latest_intent_key_phrases.description: Key terms related to the latest intent (2-5 phrases)

pivot_detected.description: Whether user has significantly changed their focus (hard pivot)
